programmes.show_description: Patrol officer Malek Badeer stops a car with a dangerous DIY repair job, and patrol man Matt Rugel's routine traffic stop proves unfortunate for a wanted man.
Tanker driver Sludge tries to dodge disaster, Steve Graham suffers from his worst nightmare on the road, and Macca McReady hits rough weather that throws him into jeopardy.
Sean and Daniel attempt a risky recovery after a lorry loaded with rotten potatoes has rolled, blocking a busy London route. In Scotland, a van has plunged into Loch Eck.
On a busy A-road, the Alpha team rescues a lorry stuck in deep mud after it veers off-road, while on the M25, Lantern Recovery responds when a slide-bed loses its wheels.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. At Christmas, the traffic cops have their hands full as drunks end up getting behind the wheel.
A gang of lorry thieves trigger a major manhunt, a young man is busted for heroin possession, and a fraudster is taken into custody.
A petrol thief runs out of gas, the helicopter follows a car thief to the fair and a drunk driver does not have to travel far to be patched up.
Western starring Edmond O'Brien and Dean Jagger. John Vickers joins Custer's cavalry regiment seeking private revenge. (1951)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western starring Edmond O'Brien and Dean Jagger. John Vickers joins Custer's cavalry regiment seeking private revenge. (1951)
Western starring Burt Lancaster and Diana Lynn. A man seeks a better life with his son in Texas, only to become embroiled in a feud between rival households. (1955)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western starring Burt Lancaster and Diana Lynn. A man seeks a better life with his son in Texas, only to become embroiled in a feud between rival households. (1955)
Craig's newest driver must prove himself on Mud Mountain; facing ice, muck and massive pressure, Theron tries to stay ahead of the fleet, only to be stopped by someone else's mistake.
In an episode focusing on young drivers, a silver Astra leads Dan on a 100mph chase down before U-turning into oncoming traffic.
This episode kicks off with a pursuit that pushes speeds of almost 150 miles an hour. Coups and the team get behind a high-performance Mercedes that speeds away.
Mozza and Jonny pull a drink driver who's more than three times the legal limit at 4pm. And Phil's on the hunt for a runaway driver who vanishes into an estate.
The Quarter Finals. Conclusion of Shaun Murphy vs World No. 1 Judd Trump, 10-8 winner in Monday's match against Mark Allen. Action live from Manchester Central, presented by Katie Shanahan.
A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.
A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in less than 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat.
The agents investigate a ministry led by a man whose son seems to possess the power to heal - and to kill - with the touch of his hand.
Sergeant Rob Marks hunts down a man with a gun, a novice driver causes a three-car crash and a busy shopping plaza is the scene of a daylight shooting.
Steve finds himself up the creak without a paddle on a desert island delivery, Yogi runs out of road, and two concrete specialists head off the map and into trouble.
Dan tackles a cherry picker stuck in a boggy bridleway. In Worcestershire, Kieran faces a challenging uphill battle to recover a stranded farm vehicle. Will they find a way out?
Daniel and Dean strip a burnt-out horse box for recovery but one wrong move could bring the whole thing crashing down. Mouse races to clear a lorry without a back wheel on the A66.

In an episode focusing on young drivers, a silver Astra leads Dan on a 100mph chase down before U-turning into oncoming traffic.
There is a hair-raising pursuit through the market town of Ripley which sees a driver mounting pavements.
A drink driver suffers a spectacular crash, a van loses control during a chase and the helicopter comes in handy during a manhunt.
Western with Glenn Ford. A town sheriff with a reputation as a legendary gunfighter is called to a showdown with a younger gunslinger and tries to talk him out of the duel. (1967)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western with Glenn Ford. A town sheriff with a reputation as a legendary gunfighter is called to a showdown with a younger gunslinger and tries to talk him out of the duel. (1967)
A town Marshal (Gary Cooper) and his new bride (Grace Kelly) must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon, when the gang leader he sent to jail years ago arrives on the noon train.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A town Marshal (Gary Cooper) and his new bride (Grace Kelly) must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon, when the gang leader he sent to jail years ago arrives on the noon train.
Craig's brother Brent borrows a logging machine, leading to a risky mountainside recovery; veteran log hauler Dan Millar battles rough roads and torn up tires to make it to the mill.
In an episode focusing on shoplifters, Julian pursues the users of a getaway car that crashed, and James arrests the same man twice.
Tonight's episode kicks off with a high-speed pursuit of an April fool driving a Vauxhall Meriva. A direct hit from Dan's X5 isn't enough to bring the runaway to a stop.
Three teenagers allegedly threaten a shopkeeper with a gun. The firearms team flood the area and it's not long before Paul and Lewis catch sight of a trio who fit the bill.
The Quarter Finals. Four-time World Champion Mark Selby faces the winner of Tuesday's first round match between fellow multiple World Champions John Higgins and Mark Williams.
A deputy tries to level with a man who's struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun.
After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman's lies one-by-one.
Mulder and Scully track a wolf-like creature linked to Native American legend.
A 911 call about stolen gas leads Lieutenant Stacey to the local school, Patrolman Gibson is called to a suspected carjacking, and Officer Rugel finds marijuana.
